chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1680 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 27.11.2025 Haji Muhammad Sulleman advocate a/w petitioners Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G Sindh a/w IO SIP Gul Hassan Khokhar Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Additional P.G Sindh *** Investigation Officer has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1, wherein she has categorically denied the allegations levelled in the FIR bearing Crime No.26 of 2025 registered at P.S Mahi Makol District Qamber Shahdadkot under Sections 365-B, 458 and 34 PPC read with Section 3 of Prevention of Trafficking in Persons Act 2018 and states that she being sui juris has contracted marriage of free-will with petitioner No.2. Investigation Officer submits that based on the statement of lady petitioner he will file his final report before the learned Magistrate concerned for disposal of the case under C-class. In view of the above, instant petition is disposed of with directions to Investigation Officer to file his report keeping in view the statement of lady petitioner before learned Magistrate within seven days for disposal of the case in accordance with law. Meanwhile petitioners shall not be arrested in above FIR and they may be provided protection. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
